task_completion.description: Verify the agent is on the Contact Details page for James Anderson.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrangeHRM interface should display 'James Anderson' or 'EMP001' and indicate that the 'Contact Details' section is active.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent interacts with the Work Telephone input field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Work Telephone' input field should be focused, active, or show the original number ('212-555-0101') being deleted.

task_completion.description: Verify the new telephone number is entered into the correct field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact string '646-555-9900' must be visible inside the 'Work Telephone' input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent clicks the Save button.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mouse cursor should be hovering over or clicking the 'Save' button located at the bottom of the Contact Details form.

task_completion.description: Verify the changes were successfully saved in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success toast notification (e.g., 'Successfully Saved' or 'Successfully Updated') should appear on the screen, or the page should reflect the saved state with '646-555-9900' permanently displayed in the Work Telephone field.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the OrangeHRM web interface to make the change, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows, SQL prompts, or curl commands should be visible in the screenshots performing database updates.

integrity.description: Ensure the interaction happens within a genuine web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a standard web browser (e.g., Chrome/Firefox) navigating the OrangeHRM application, not a text editor or static image manipulation.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser Developer Tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser Developer Tools (Inspect Element) panel should not be open or used to alter the DOM text to fake the updated phone number or success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The environment runs OrangeHRM 5.8. The browser is pre-navigated to the Contact Details page for James Anderson (EMP001). The initial work telephone number is '212-555-0101'. The agent must use the OrangeHRM GUI to change the Work Telephone field to '646-555-9900' and save the changes.
